app_name.description: Application name (lowercase, hyphens ok). e.g. claims-triage

use_case_group.description: Use-case group this app belongs to. Apps in the same group share one Lakebase project, can read each other's reference data, and share AD groups. Convention: lowercase, hyphens, <=63 chars. e.g. clinical-informatics, rev-cycle-analytics, dicom-imaging

database_name.description: Lakebase database name for this app within the use-case-group project (one DB per app on the production branch)

needs_shared_reference_data.description: Does this app read from the use-case-group's shared reference database (synced UC tables that all apps in the group share)? (yes/no)

dev_catalog.description: Unity Catalog name in dev workspace (for app's UC reads/writes; separate from Lakebase)

prod_catalog.description: Unity Catalog name in prod workspace

audit_catalog.description: UC catalog that holds the central audit.app_events table (shared across all HSS apps and use-case groups)

use_obo.description: Does this app need On-Behalf-Of user auth for UC reads? (yes/no) — yes when end users have per-row UC permissions you want enforced

expose_data_api.description: Expose this app's Lakebase database via the Lakebase Data API (PostgREST)? (yes/no) — opt-in for apps that want direct REST access to tables instead of (or in addition to) FastAPI

enable_branch_per_pr.description: Create an ephemeral Lakebase child branch per PR (off production) for safe migration testing? (yes/no)

github_codeowners_team.description: GitHub team (org/slug) that owns deploy + governance files. e.g. hss-platform/platform

github_org_repo.description: GitHub <org>/<repo> for this app (used by drift-detection workflow + setup_branch_protection.py)
